Index

A | B | C | D | E | F | H | K | M | O | P | R | S | T | U

A

  • add_roughnesscoefficient_values() (RoughnessCoefficients.Values method)
  • annual_maintenance_implementer() (FlowPreProcessing method)

B

  • Basic (class in HydroGenerate.hydropower_potential)

C

  • calculate_head() (in module HydroGenerate.hydropower_potential)
  • calculate_hp_potential() (in module HydroGenerate.hydropower_potential)
  • ConstantEletrictyPrice (class in HydroGenerate.hydropower_potential)
  • ConstantEletrictyPrice_pd (class in HydroGenerate.hydropower_potential)
  • cost_calculation() (ONRL_BaselineCostModeling_V2 method)
  • CrossFlowTurbine (class in HydroGenerate.turbine_calculation)

D

  • DarcyWeisbach (class in HydroGenerate.hydraulic_processing)
  • designdiameter_calculator() (HydraulicDesignParameters method)
  • designflow_calculator() (PercentExceedance method)
  • diameter_check() (DarcyWeisbach method)
  • Diversion (class in HydroGenerate.hydropower_potential)
  • DW_FrictionFactor (class in HydroGenerate.hydraulic_processing)
  • DW_RoughnessSelector (class in HydroGenerate.hydraulic_processing)

E

  • EconomicParameters (class in HydroGenerate.hydropower_potential)

F

  • flow_duration_curve_plot() (in module HydroGenerate.summary_results)
  • flow_efficiency_plot() (in module HydroGenerate.summary_results)
  • flow_efficiency_power_plot() (in module HydroGenerate.summary_results)
  • FlowPreProcessing (class in HydroGenerate.flow_preprocessing)
  • FlowPreProcessingParameters (class in HydroGenerate.flow_preprocessing)
  • FlowRange (class in HydroGenerate.turbine_calculation)
  • flowrange_calculator() (FlowRange method)
  • FrancisTurbine (class in HydroGenerate.turbine_calculation)
  • frictionfactor_calculator() (DW_FrictionFactor method)

  • plant_elecgeneration_plot() (in module HydroGenerate.summary_results)
  • plant_turbineflow_plot() (in module HydroGenerate.summary_results)

    • (Manning_RoughnessSelector method)

S
